name: I had bad asthma before, but work chemicals made it worse. Can I get comp in Salt Lake area?
description: Yes, prove job exertion unusually aggravated pre-existing asthma per Allen Rule.[3]

mainEntity.name: I had bad asthma before, but work chemicals made it worse. Can I get comp in Salt Lake area?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, prove job exertion unusually aggravated pre-existing asthma per Allen Rule.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, under Utah’s Allen Rule, if pre-existing condition contributed, prove unusual exertion beyond daily life caused aggravation.[3] Normal exertion suffices without pre-existing issue.[3] Key factors: (1) Pre-existing must contribute to injury; (2) Show extraordinary work exertion; (3) Medical link required.[3] Get doctor opinion on aggravation, document job duties; file claim emphasizing extras.[3] Legal help clarifies standards.
